randomization_policy: Deterministic, snapshot-bound, and replayable. Each seed is derived from SHA-256(snapshot_id|seed_name) and fixed before first exposure to labels or the test final untouched.

window_policy.external: 40-case window on each of E1 and E2.
window_policy.reseed: No reseed after J_test is opened.

sampler_policy.split_sampler: Deterministic, without replacement, with frozen item order.
sampler_policy.perturbation_sampler: Pre-registered family and epsilon grid only.
sampler_policy.ablation_sampler: Same item order and same seed as baseline.

allowed: Replay after environment repair when inputs are unchanged.

execution_order: Freeze the snapshot and verify hashes.
Run pre-registered ablations on J_cal and J_val only.
Open J_test once and keep it untouched.
Run blind external validation on E1 and E2.
notes: Seed derivation is deterministic and snapshot-bound.
All post hoc adjustments are forbidden; any rerun must reuse the recorded seeds.
